# schedule

```go
import "github.com/lucasassuncao/gopaper/internal/schedule"
```

Package schedule provides daily time windows used by category variants.

  - [func ParseDateRange\(start, end string\) \(DateWindow, error\)](<#ParseDateRange>)

<a name="DateWindow"></a>
## type [DateWindow](<https://github.com/lucasassuncao/gopaper/blob/main/internal/schedule/schedule.go#L60-L63>)

DateWindow is an inclusive calendar date range \(month/day only, no year\), using the same wraparound semantics as Window \(e.g. "12\-21"/"03\-20" spans New Year's Eve\).

```go
type DateWindow struct {
    // contains filtered or unexported fields
}
```

<a name="ParseDateRange"></a>
### func [ParseDateRange](<https://github.com/lucasassuncao/gopaper/blob/main/internal/schedule/schedule.go#L66>)

```go
func ParseDateRange(start, end string) (DateWindow, error)
```

ParseDateRange parses two "MM\-DD" \(zero\-padded\) strings into a DateWindow.

<a name="DateWindow.Contains"></a>
### func \(DateWindow\) [Contains](<https://github.com/lucasassuncao/gopaper/blob/main/internal/schedule/schedule.go#L93>)

```go
func (d DateWindow) Contains(t time.Time) bool
```

Contains reports whether t's month/day falls inside the range.

<a name="Window"></a>
## type [Window](<https://github.com/lucasassuncao/gopaper/blob/main/internal/schedule/schedule.go#L12-L15>)

Window is an inclusive daily time window with minute granularity. It may cross midnight \(e.g. 18:00\-05:59\).

```go
type Window struct {
    // contains filtered or unexported fields
}
```

<a name="ParseWindow"></a>
### func [ParseWindow](<https://github.com/lucasassuncao/gopaper/blob/main/internal/schedule/schedule.go#L18>)

```go
func ParseWindow(s string) (Window, error)
```

ParseWindow parses a "HH:MM\-HH:MM" \(24h\) string into a Window.

<a name="Window.Contains"></a>
### func \(Window\) [Contains](<https://github.com/lucasassuncao/gopaper/blob/main/internal/schedule/schedule.go#L48>)

```go
func (w Window) Contains(t time.Time) bool
```

Contains reports whether t's time of day falls inside the window.
